## Problem

What user problem should this solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the behavior or UI you want.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any workaround or alternative approach.

## Scope

Which area does this affect?

- VPN connection
- Routing rules
- Node import
- Subscriptions
- Local node editor
- Per-app proxy
- Media routing
- UI / language
- Logs / diagnostics
- Other

## Additional Context

Add screenshots, examples, or compatibility notes if helpful.
